features.name: Repository Harness and Baseline Verification
features.description: Create the startup harness, define the current project scope, and make the empty/early repository restartable for agent-assisted development.
done_criteria: AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, init.sh, and init.ps1 exist
Baseline verifier runs without requiring application code
Current objective and first implementation phase are explicit
features.evidence: 2026-06-04: Created startup harness files. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File init.ps1. Structural harness validation passed with Overall 100/100.

features.name: Phase 1 - Protocol Base Objects and Storage
features.description: Implement TaskSpec, TaskUnit, TaskRelation, ClientRecord, ArtifactRef, ArtifactStore, LedgerEvent, JSONL EventLedger, and base ProtocolConfig.
done_criteria: Root task can be registered
Root input artifact can be saved and content-hash checked
Event ledger can append and read events
features.evidence: 2026-06-04: Design prerequisite completed for Phase 1 technology stack. Updated Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-03-tokenshare-protocol-technical-design.md to choose Python 3.12+, SQLite, JSON, JSONL, and local filesystem storage for V1; external workflow/distributed systems remain design references only. Verification passed with .\init.ps1. 2026-06-04: Added reference_repos/ with shallow sparse source snapshots for package-layout research: Temporal Python SDK, Luigi, cwltool, Prefect, and Dagster. Updated startup compileall to exclude reference_repos/ because it is external reference source, not TokenShare runtime code. 2026-06-05: Created initial src/tokenshare package layout and mirrored tests skeleton; updated init scripts so pytest runs with PYTHONPATH=src now that tests/ exists. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File E:\TokenEcnomic\TokenShare\init.ps1; pytest ran tests\test_package_layout.py with 1 passed. 2026-06-05: Added Doc/agent-navigation.md to document fact-source priority, module routing, and reference_repo usage rules. 2026-06-05: Moved agent navigation out of Doc/TechnicalDocument/ into Doc/agent-navigation.md and kept it navigation-only; verification passed with init.ps1 and harness validation returned Overall 100/100. 2026-06-05: Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-05-phase-1-minimal-object-field-spec.md to distinguish protocol object names, future class names, object fields, JSON keys, event types, and SQLite materialized-index table names; updated Doc/agent-navigation.md to index the new field spec. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest ran tests\test_package_layout.py with 1 passed. Harness validation returned Overall 100/100. 2026-06-06: Implemented Phase 1 protocol base objects and storage: ArtifactRef, ProtocolConfig, TaskSpec, TaskUnit, TaskRelation, ClientRecord, RootTaskRegistrar, ArtifactStore, LedgerEvent/EventLedger, and SQLiteMaterializedIndex. Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-06-phase-1-code-map.md to map code to the Phase 1 field spec. TDD red run failed as expected with missing Phase 1 modules; implementation verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1, pytest collected 7 items and all 7 passed. 2026-06-06: Created conda environment tokenshare with Python 3.12.13 and pytest 9.0.3, and updated init.ps1/init.sh to run through conda run -n tokenshare python. Verification passed with both powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 and bash ./init.sh; both printed Using conda environment: tokenshare and pytest 7 passed. 2026-06-07: Replaced the incorrect Markdown dependency note with pip-installable requirements.txt; conda run -n tokenshare python -m pip install -r requirements.txt passed. 2026-06-07: Audited TaskState boundary against the TDD; removed Leased and Verifying from TaskState because lease validity belongs to Lease and verification progress belongs to Attempt. Added a regression test and updated Phase 1 field/code-map docs. Verification passed with targeted tests and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 8 items and all 8 passed. 2026-06-07: Fixed EventLedger idempotency conflict handling and narrowed tokenshare.core package exports to avoid storage orchestration import cycles. Added conflict regression coverage and documented Phase 2 coordination debt in Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-07-phase-2-coordination-debt-memo.md. Full startup verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 9 items and all 9 passed.

features.name: Phase 2 - Task Graph, State Machines, and Scheduling
features.description: Implement TaskGraph, TaskUnit state transitions, Lease and Attempt state machines, Scheduler, and LeaseManager.
done_criteria: Ready nodes can be scheduled
Expired leases return tasks to Ready when retry policy permits
All state transitions are written to the event ledger
features.evidence: 2026-06-06: Activated as the next feature after feat-002 completion; implementation was pending at that point. Startup harness now uses conda environment tokenshare. 2026-06-06: Updated design documents after external research so Phase 2 TaskGraph/state-machine work preserves future boundaries for DecompositionProposal, VerificationReport, ExpansionDecision, MergePlan, and MergeRecord. 2026-06-06: Added mandatory external-research materialization workflow: project-impacting online research must be saved locally and indexed before it is treated as design evidence. 2026-06-06: Added mandatory PowerShell/UTF-8 workflow: routine repository reads and searches should use PowerShell with explicit UTF-8, and rg should not be the default search tool; Phase 2 implementation remained pending at that point. 2026-06-07: Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-07-phase-2-coordination-debt-memo.md as the coordination-boundary memo for future Phase 2 orchestration work; TaskGraph/Scheduler/LeaseManager/Attempt orchestration should not be added to RootTaskRegistrar. 2026-06-08: Created Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-08-phase-2-minimal-field-state-event-spec.md as the dedicated Phase 2 minimal field/state/event spec; it defines TaskGraph, TaskUnitStateChange, Lease, Attempt, SchedulingDecision, RecoveryAction, event ordering, SQLite projections, natural-language artifact boundaries, and module placement. Updated Doc/agent-navigation.md and source_documents to index it. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 9 items and all 9 passed. 2026-06-08: Refined the Phase 2 spec with implementation-start decisions: Phase 2 remains protocol-kernel only, no plugin/executor/AI/verification/merge/settlement work; do not add max_parallel_attempts_per_unit yet; use allow_shadow_execution=false as one-active-lease-per-unit; write every successful heartbeat as LEASE_STATE_CHANGED Active -> Active. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 9 items and all 9 passed. 2026-06-08: Implemented Phase 2 minimal protocol-kernel code: Lease/Attempt objects and enums, TaskGraph ready/dependency/cycle checks, TaskUnit/Lease/Attempt state machines, FIFO Scheduler/SchedulingDecision, LeaseManager claim/heartbeat/expiry recovery, Phase 2 EventType values, SQLite leases/attempts/recovery projections, and top-level ProtocolEngine schedule/heartbeat/expiry event flow. Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-08-phase-2-code-map.md. TDD red run failed as expected with missing Phase 2 modules/objects; heartbeat red run failed as expected with missing ProtocolEngine.record_lease_heartbeat; targeted green passed with 9 Phase 2 tests. Full startup verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 18 items and all 18 passed. 2026-06-23: Stabilized Phase 2 scheduling and lease invariants before Phase 3: Scheduler FIFO now orders by TaskUnit.created_at/unit_id, LeaseManager rejects early expiry and heartbeat at or after expires_at, and ProtocolEngine reconstructs active leases from EventLedger before scheduling to prevent duplicate active claims when callers omit active_leases_by_unit_id. Regression red run failed as expected with 3 new failures; targeted green passed with 7 tests; full startup verification passed with .\init.ps1, pytest collected 21 items and all 21 passed.

features.name: Phase 3 - Plugin and Executor Contracts
features.description: Implement PluginRegistry, ExecutorRegistry, ExecutionRequest, ExecutionSubmission, MockAIExecutor, deterministic executor boundary, and AI output artifact contracts.
done_criteria: Plugin versions are fixed during a run
Executors receive a unified request and return a unified submission
AI-style path can persist PromptPackage, RawModelOutput, and ParsedModelOutput references
features.evidence: 2026-06-08: Activated as the next feature after feat-003 completion; implementation not started. 2026-06-09: Recorded Phase 3 pre-start boundary notes in progress.md and session-handoff.md: freeze or migrate RootTaskRegistrar before adding Phase 3 orchestration, and move hard-coded scheduler client availability strings into an explicit ExecutorRegistry/client status contract when the Phase 3 technical document is written. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 18 items and all 18 passed. 2026-06-22: Added a non-authoritative P01-P07 candidate mechanism specification and comparison report with 15 decision items. 2026-06-22: Integrated P08-P12 into the existing candidate-spec sections, producing 92 unique normative definitions, 16 invariants, and 20 decision records; corrected the PBFT-to-AI-verifier mapping and limited Dawid-Skene to future discrete weak-verification tasks. 2026-06-22: Integrated P13-P22 by mechanism into the same candidate specification, producing 109 unique normative definitions, 21 invariants, and 27 decision records; added environment-bound verification, durable-state promotion, action/observation provenance, benchmark identity, and explainable deterministic allocation boundaries while keeping full ToT/ReAct/LeanDojo/miniF2F/Contract-Net systems out of V1. 2026-06-22: Reorganized the full candidate specification by protocol lifecycle rather than paper intake order; stable IDs and technical judgments remain unchanged, while invariants, rejected designs, decisions, adjudication order, TDD guidance, and conclusions now use thematic/phase grouping. Startup verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 18 items and all 18 passed. 2026-06-23: Integrated the P01-P22 recommendations into the main TDD as V1 guidance and synced indexes; candidate spec is now a provenance/integration record, not a blocker or second authority. Phase 3 scope remains Plugin and Executor Contracts only; implementation code has not started. Verification passed with .\init.ps1; pytest collected 18 items and all 18 passed in 0.33s. 2026-06-23: Audited Phase 1/Phase 2 code maps against current code as source of truth. Updated Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-06-phase-1-code-map.md and Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-08-phase-2-code-map.md to include existing but previously unmapped objects, flow results, helpers, and source/test inventories. Path audit confirmed all code-map src/tests/Doc references exist. It records execution-loop-first design, artifact-backed ExecutionRequest/ExecutionSubmission bodies, event refs/digests/summaries, and Attempt.Running -> Submitted after recorded submission while keeping verification/canonical/merge/settlement out of Phase 3. Verification passed with feature_list JSON parse, placeholder scan on the new spec, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 21 items and all 21 passed in 0.39s. 2026-06-23: Accepted and recorded the remaining Phase 3 implementation-start decisions: AllocationDecision is inline in ExecutionRequest, PluginDescriptor/ExecutorDescriptor bodies are artifact-backed, executor status uses Available/Busy/Offline/Disabled, and SQLite projection is index-only with registry_snapshots/execution_requests/execution_submissions/executor_statuses. Index/conflict/boundary checks passed; verification passed with feature_list JSON parse, stale unresolved-phrase scans, phase3-spec-index-ok, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 21 items and all 21 passed in 0.41s. 2026-06-23: Synced the main TDD to the Phase 3 field draft event contract: Phase 3 now uses REGISTRY_SNAPSHOT_RECORDED, EXECUTION_REQUEST_RECORDED, and EXECUTION_SUBMISSION_RECORDED in the main TDD, and the draft now records the required code-alignment notes for RootTaskRegistrar freeze, Scheduler status-contract migration, and Attempt Running -> Submitted state-machine support. Verification passed with targeted stale-event-name scan, feature_list JSON parse, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1; pytest collected 21 items and all 21 passed in 0.34s. 2026-06-23: Implemented Phase 3 Plugin and Executor Contracts with TDD: artifact-backed PluginDescriptor/ExecutorDescriptor registry freeze, explicit ExecutorStatus Available/Busy/Offline/Disabled, ExecutionRequest/ExecutionSubmission dataclasses, MockAIExecutor, DeterministicLocalExecutor, REGISTRY_SNAPSHOT_RECORDED/EXECUTION_REQUEST_RECORDED/EXECUTION_SUBMISSION_RECORDED events, Attempt Running -> Submitted state transition, and SQLite registry_snapshots/execution_requests/execution_submissions/executor_statuses index-only projections. Red checks failed as expected for missing Phase 3 modules and missing deterministic executor; targeted green passed with 9 tests; full startup verification passed with .\init.ps1, pytest collected 28 items and all 28 passed. Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-23-phase-3-code-map.md. 2026-06-23: Fixed Phase 3 boundary review findings: submission must match current running attempt task/unit/attempt/lease/fencing token before Attempt Running -> Submitted; mismatches remain audit-only submission events. Scheduler now accepts serialized Available plus legacy active only, not ready/online/idle. Red checks failed as expected; targeted green passed with 6 tests; full startup verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File E:\TokenEcnomic\TokenShare\init.ps1, pytest collected 30 items and all 30 passed in 0.67s.

features.name: Phase 4 - Verification, Canonical Output, and Expansion
features.description: Implement common data checks, plugin-domain verification orchestration, VerificationReport, first_verified_bundle selection, DecompositionProposal, ExpansionDecision, MergePlan, and atomic graph updates.
done_criteria: Only one canonical output bundle can bind per TaskUnit
expand records a structured proposal and expansion decision before creating child nodes and dependency edges atomically
Invalid expansion does not mutate the task graph
Natural-language candidate outputs pass schema, evidence-reference, required-output coverage, and plugin-domain validation before binding
features.evidence: 2026-06-23: Activated as the next feature after feat-004 completion; implementation not started. 2026-06-24: Audited Phase 4 expansion authority wording before implementation. Corrected main TDD, Phase 1 field spec, candidate mechanism notes, README, navigation, progress, handoff, and Phase 4 discussion notes to make plugin-owned, versioned split strategies the only source of protocol-level DecompositionProposal / MergePlan direct generation; AI/executor output cannot be expansion candidate split input and cannot directly define TaskUnit expansion. TaskSpec.split_strategy_id is only a reference to a plugin-declared strategy, and split_strategy_params can only configure schema-allowed plugin parameters, not carry runtime-authored split rules. Targeted stale wording scan found no live design/code hits after correction; feature_list JSON parse passed; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed. 2026-06-24: Classified follow-up impact. Phase 4 objects/events/coordinators remain discussion/implementation scope; the missing plugin-declared split strategy descriptor contract was a Phase 3 linkage issue and was directly fixed with TDD. Added SplitStrategyContract, PluginDescriptor.split_strategies persistence, registry snapshot split_strategy_ids summaries, fixture/test coverage, and synchronized Phase 3 docs. Red check failed as expected on missing split_strategy_ids; targeted green passed with tests\plugins\test_plugin_registry.py reporting 1 passed in 0.16s; full powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.69s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Updated Phase 4 discussion notes after design approval: plugin split strategies directly generate a unified SplitStrategyResult with mutually exclusive action=complete or action=expand; AI/executor candidate split proposals are not part of Phase 4 expansion. The complete path commits through completion_batch:{expansion_decision_id}, containing EXPANSION_DECISION_RECORDED(action=complete) and TASK_UNIT_STATE_CHANGED(current -> Completed), without proposal, merge plan, or graph mutation; the expand path carries DecompositionProposal and independent MergePlan bodies for protocol validation and later artifact/event recording. Discussion note placeholder/stale-path scan passed; feature_list JSON parse passed; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.68s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 split strategy failure boundary: plugin split strategy call failure, timeout, exception, or invalid SplitStrategyResult writes only SPLIT_STRATEGY_INVOCATION_RECORDED as an audit event with failed/invalid_result status; it does not write EXPANSION_DECISION_RECORDED, does not persist proposal or merge plan as authoritative facts, does not mutate graph, and does not advance TaskUnit or Attempt state. Succeeded invocation is only an audit precondition for later validation/artifact/decision flow. Feature list JSON parse passed; an intermediate PowerShell JSON write introduced a UTF-8 BOM that made init.ps1 fail while reading feature_list.json with Python utf-8; the file was rewritten as UTF-8 without BOM and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 then passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.65s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 audit/result-body and MergePlan boundary clarifications. SPLIT_STRATEGY_INVOCATION_RECORDED stores only invocation summary, result_action/result_digest, error kind, and short error summary, not the full SplitStrategyResult body; full DecompositionProposal and MergePlan bodies are persisted by later artifact events. MergePlan is clarified as a plugin-generated instance contract for one expansion that references plugin MergePolicy/merge_policy_id; it is not a protocol-defined merge rule or algorithm. Feature list JSON parse passed; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.70s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 expansion idempotency boundary. The same expansion_scope may have multiple split strategy invocation audit attempts using split_invocation:{expansion_scope_hash}:attempt:{invocation_attempt_no}, but accepted EXPANSION_DECISION_RECORDED is unique per expansion_scope via expansion_decision:{expansion_scope_hash}. Proposal and merge plan keys include proposal_digest / merge_plan_digest only to dedupe identical artifacts; different digests in the same scope are duplicate/conflict, not competing valid plans. TASK_EXPANDED is derived from accepted expansion_decision_id and child unit/relation IDs are deterministic. Feature list JSON parse passed; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.67s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 DecompositionProposal minimum structure: six top-level blocks proposal_header, child_specs, dependency_edges, expected_outputs, merge_slots, and inline promotion_guard_evidence. Promotion guard evidence remains inside the proposal for Phase 4 rather than a separate artifact; long diagnostics may use evidence_ref. Only typed I/O, independently schedulable, validator-policy-backed, explicit-output-contract durable subgoals may become TaskUnits; free-form thought, hidden reasoning, temporary drafts, and natural-language next-step suggestions cannot be promoted. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording this design evidence passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, file header was 7B 0D 0A with no BOM, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.65s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 MergePlan first-version schema. MergePlan top-level blocks are merge_plan_header, merge_policy_ref, required_slots, parent_output_mapping, hash_recording_requirements, merge_validation_requirements, and plugin_payload. First version supports required_slots only and does not support optional_slots; optional slots are deferred to Phase 5 merge/contribution design to avoid bringing late optional outputs, re-merge, quality improvement, contribution, and settlement semantics into Phase 4. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording MergePlan schema passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, Phase 4 discussion notes placeholder scan found no TODO/TBD/FIXME/pending-fill markers, feature_list.json header was 7B 0D 0A with no BOM, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.71s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 complete-path state advancement. Because V1 targets deterministic-result large computation tasks, an accepted complete decision is committed through completion_batch:{expansion_decision_id}, containing EXPANSION_DECISION_RECORDED(action=complete) followed by TASK_UNIT_STATE_CHANGED(current -> Completed). The complete path writes no DecompositionProposal, MergePlan, TASK_EXPANDED, child TASK_UNIT_CREATED, or child TASK_RELATION_CREATED; parent merge/readiness remains Phase 5. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording complete-path state advancement passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, Phase 4 discussion notes placeholder scan found no TODO/TBD/FIXME/pending-fill markers, feature_list.json header was 7B 0D 0A with no BOM, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.66s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 complete.action_body evidence shape. completion_evidence is inline in EXPANSION_DECISION_RECORDED(action=complete).action_body, not a separate artifact. First-version fields are completion_kind, validator_policy_id, verification_report_id, canonical_selection_id, canonical_output_bundle_digest, completed_output_refs, and plugin_completion_summary; long diagnostics, proof material, or plugin debug output should use artifact refs. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording complete.action_body evidence shape passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, Phase 4 discussion notes placeholder scan found no TODO/TBD/FIXME/pending-fill markers, feature_list.json header was 7B 0D 0A with no BOM, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.70s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 first_verified_bundle ordering authority. For a TaskUnit, canonical selection orders eligible passed/accepted VERIFICATION_RECORDED reports by ledger event_seq; submission time and verification completed time are audit-only fields, and CANONICAL_OUTPUTS_BOUND is the final commitment fact. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording first_verified_bundle ordering passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, tracked UTF-8 file headers had no BOM, Phase 4 discussion notes placeholder/stale sorting scan was empty, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.73s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 verification/canonical selection input boundary for expansion. VERIFICATION_RECORDED(status=passed|accepted) is eligibility only; expansion starts only from the CANONICAL_OUTPUTS_BOUND selected canonical output bundle. Losing, late, unverified, raw, private executor, or unselected verification-only outputs cannot be expansion inputs. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording this input boundary passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, tracked UTF-8 file headers had no BOM, Phase 4 discussion notes placeholder/stale verification-canonical input scan was empty, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.71s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 ExpectedOutputRef placement. ExpectedOutputRef is a protocol-level output future/resolution object with independent dataclass and SQLite index-only projection; DecompositionProposal.expected_outputs carries plugin-generated declarations, and accepted expansion derives the projection from the accepted proposal plus final TASK_EXPANDED. TaskUnit.plugin_payload and metadata do not carry authoritative resolution state. Phase 4 first version does not add a separate EXPECTED_OUTPUT_REF_CREATED event. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. Verification after recording ExpectedOutputRef placement passed: feature_list.json parsed as UTF-8, tracked UTF-8 file headers had no BOM, Phase 4 discussion notes placeholder/stale ExpectedOutputRef scan was empty, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.68s. 2026-06-24: Accepted Phase 4 design-closure decisions for the three remaining pre-TDD questions. SQLite projection will be added in one pass for verification_reports, canonical_outputs, split_strategy_invocations, decomposition_proposals, expansion_decisions, merge_plans, and expected_output_refs; expansion-derived rows are consumable only after final TASK_EXPANDED. Attempt state changes are limited to verification/canonical selection results: invalid output -> Rejected, selected canonical -> Canonical, canonical loser remains Verified, and duplicate proposal/duplicate expansion does not alter Attempt. append_batch() batch identity will be explicit in the LedgerEvent envelope with batch_id, batch_index, and batch_size; correlation_id is flow tracing only. 2026-06-24: Created Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-24-phase-4-verification-canonical-expansion-field-spec.md as the implementation-ready Phase 4 field spec / TDD plan. It fixes Phase 4 object fields, schema versions, event payloads, idempotency keys, LedgerEvent.v2 batch envelope, EventLedger.append_batch behavior, SQLite index-only projection tables, ProtocolEngine flow APIs, state-machine changes, and ten red/green TDD tasks. Verification evidence: feature_list JSON parse passed; the new field spec placeholder scan found no TODO/TBD/FIXME/待填写/待定 markers; tracked UTF-8 file headers had no BOM; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.69s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Reviewed external Phase 4 field-spec feedback and found all 8 items were real spec/TDD gaps rather than implemented-code bugs. Updated the Phase 4 field spec with schema-aware LedgerEvent.v1/v2 hash behavior, complete-path completion_batch atomicity, derived VerificationReport eligibility and negative tests, removal of the Submitted->Submitted self-loop wording, canonical-output replay authority via CANONICAL_OUTPUTS_BOUND/projection injection, staged-artifact non-authority for invalid expansion, accepted-decision lookup checks for invocation/canonical/descriptor/scope, and child initial-state derivation rules. Verification evidence: feature_list JSON parse passed; Phase 4 field spec placeholder/stale scan passed; tracked UTF-8 BOM scan had no hits; .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 30 items and 30 passed in 0.71s. Phase 4 implementation remains not started. 2026-06-24: Rechecked Phase 4 implementation readiness after the follow-up revisions. Reread the external review attachment and confirmed all 8 review items are already covered by the Phase 4 field spec: schema-aware LedgerEvent.v1/v2 hash behavior, completion_batch atomic complete path, derived verification eligibility, no Submitted->Submitted self-loop, canonical replay/projection injection, staged artifact non-authority, accepted-decision source checks, and child initial-state derivation. Patched stale current-entry wording in the Phase 4 discussion notes, progress log, and handoff so complete decisions are consistently described as completion_batch:{expansion_decision_id} with decision + completed state in one batch. Phase 4 implementation remains not started and can begin from Task 1 tests/storage/test_phase4_event_ledger_batch.py. 2026-06-24: Implemented Phase 4 Task 1 ledger batch foundation with TDD. Added tests/storage/test_phase4_event_ledger_batch.py and updated src/tokenshare/storage/events.py for schema-aware LedgerEvent.v1/v2 serialization, EventDraft, LedgerEvent.v2 non-batch null batch fields in hash, historical v1 hash-chain compatibility, and EventLedger.append_batch() with whole-batch idempotency/conflict checks, contiguous event_seq/hash chain, batch_id/batch_index/batch_size assignment, identical retry return, and partial existing batch rejection without appending. Red check failed as expected with tests\storage\test_phase4_event_ledger_batch.py reporting 6 failures for missing batch fields/v2/EventDraft/append_batch; targeted green passed with tests\storage\test_event_ledger.py tests\storage\test_phase4_event_ledger_batch.py reporting 9 passed in 0.13s; full powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 36 items and 36 passed in 0.84s. No protocol_engine.py changes and no verification/canonical/split invocation/complete decision/expand decision/SQLite Phase 4 projection/Phase 5 implementation. Follow-up: include Task 1 storage/events.py and test_phase4_event_ledger_batch.py in the Phase 4 code map when that map is created or updated. 2026-06-24: Hardened Phase 4 Task 1/2/3 after review. Added regression coverage and fixes for DecompositionProposal required-field/reference validation plus pure limit helper, Phase 4 EventType constants, ExpectedOutputRef invalid refs and deterministic logical-position ID, VerificationReport invalid status/layer-status rejection, and completion batch TaskUnit Processing -> Completed sample. Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-24-phase-4-code-map.md. Red check `$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; conda run -n tokenshare python -m pytest tests\core\test_phase4_models.py tests\storage\test_phase4_event_ledger_batch.py -q` failed as expected with 13 failed / 18 passed. Green same command passed with 31 passed in 0.13s. Expanded targeted verification passed with 42 passed in 0.16s. Full .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 64 items and 64 passed in 0.74s. No ProtocolEngine flow, SQLite Phase 4 projection, complete/expand path, Phase 5 merge/contribution/settlement, real network executor, or production AI API was implemented. 2026-06-25: Implemented Phase 4 Task 4 / Task 5 verification and canonical binding flows with TDD. Added tests/test_phase4_verification_flow.py and tests/test_phase4_canonical_flow.py; updated src/tokenshare/protocol_engine.py with VerificationFlowResult, CanonicalBindingFlowResult, ProtocolEngine.record_verification(), ProtocolEngine.bind_canonical_outputs(), and payload reconstruction helpers. Red check $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; conda run -n tokenshare python -m pytest tests\test_phase4_verification_flow.py tests\test_phase4_canonical_flow.py -q failed as expected with 13 failed because ProtocolEngine.record_verification() did not exist. Green same command passed with 14 passed in 0.34s. features.name: Phase 5 - Merge, Contribution, and Sandbox Settlement
features.description: Implement MergeCoordinator, plugin merge orchestration, MergeRecord, ContributionRecord state machine, SettlementEngine, sandbox reward formula, and subtree pruning.
done_criteria: Canonical child outputs can merge into parent output
MergePlan required slots are all covered by canonical child outputs and child output hashes are recorded
Intermediate contribution can settle after downstream success
Root completion generates exactly one sandbox settlement
features.evidence: 2026-06-25: Activated after feat-005 completion. Implementation not started. 2026-06-25: During Phase 5 brainstorm, user confirmed merge is the main axis and contribution/settlement should remain minimal but auditable. Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-external-systems-merge-notes.md after external-system research on Temporal, Celery, Dask, Airflow, MapReduce, and Spark fan-in/reduce/readiness/deduplication boundaries. 2026-06-25: Added Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-merge-discussion-notes.md to record confirmed design decisions: use normal merge TaskUnit lifecycle, require all MergePlan.required_slots to have canonical child outputs before readiness, create merge TaskUnit only after required slots are canonical, do not retrofit Phase 4 expand batches to pre-create blocked merge tasks, and keep contribution/settlement minimal but auditable. 2026-06-25: User added a Phase 5 discussion rule that every design point should first look at existing distributed/workflow system experience. User confirmed relation shape: primary explicit MergeTaskLink / merge_task_links projection plus optional narrow TaskRelation(kind=merge_of), avoiding slot/hash/input-bundle authority in generic TaskRelation or metadata. User confirmed merge task creation event shape: no standalone MERGE_READY_RECORDED in v1; derive readiness from accepted MergePlan + required slot canonical facts + no existing MergeTaskLink, then write merge_task_creation_batch with TASK_UNIT_CREATED, optional TASK_RELATION_CREATED(kind=merge_of), and final MERGE_TASK_LINK_RECORDED marker. User confirmed MERGE_RECORDED timing: MERGE_RECORDED is canonical-level merge commitment written only after merge TaskUnit CANONICAL_OUTPUTS_BOUND; v1 does not add attempt-level MERGE_ATTEMPT_RECORDED because ordinary execution/verification/canonical events cover attempt audit. Validation passed: feature_list.json UTF-8 parse ok; Phase 5 discussion/research placeholder scan had no hits; stale timing pending wording scan had no hits; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 132 items and 132 passed. These notes were design inputs at that point; the final Phase 5 field spec was added later in Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-merge-contribution-settlement-field-spec.md, and no Phase 5 implementation code existed then. 2026-06-25: User accepted the next Phase 5 design recommendations and the decisions were recorded in Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-merge-discussion-notes.md sections 9-13. Confirmed ExpectedOutputRef resolution boundary: add independent EXPECTED_OUTPUT_RESOLVED events, but for merge_plan_output v1 submit MERGE_RECORDED plus all required EXPECTED_OUTPUT_RESOLVED events atomically in merge_resolution_batch:{merge_record_id}; authoritative resolution states are expected/resolved, with blocked only as a projection hint. Confirmed contribution taxonomy: complete_canonical, expand_canonical, merge_canonical; do not use attempt-level contribution names and defer redundant verification contribution. Confirmed contribution event boundary: use CONTRIBUTION_STATE_CHANGED for null->Pending/null->Eligible creation and later transitions, with no separate CONTRIBUTION_RECORDED. Confirmed settlement boundary: root-level settlement_batch ending in SETTLEMENT_RECORDED, not per-contribution independent settlement events. Confirmed parent completion boundary: write parent_completion_batch only after all owner required expected outputs are resolved; do not put parent completion in merge_resolution_batch. Confirmed subtree pruning / early-success boundary: Phase 5 v1 remains all-required merge, defers one_success/optional slots/partial merge/factorization early pruning, and uses post-completion subtree_pruning_batch with SUBTREE_PRUNED under plugin-declared versioned pruning policy authority. These were design records at that point; the final Phase 5 field spec was added later in Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-merge-contribution-settlement-field-spec.md, and no Phase 5 implementation code existed then. Verification after recording accepted Phase 5 design decisions passed: feature_list.json UTF-8 parse ok with active_feature=feat-006 and feat-006.status=in-progress; Phase 5 discussion/research placeholder scan found no pending markers; stale next-design-point/open-question scans found no hits in Phase 5 docs, progress.md, or session-handoff.md; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 132 items and 132 passed in 6.33s. 2026-06-25: Created Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-merge-contribution-settlement-field-spec.md as the implementation-ready Phase 5 field spec / TDD plan. It fixes Phase 5 object fields, schema versions, event payloads, idempotency keys, five batch boundaries, SQLite index-only projection tables, coordinator/API drafts, replay inconsistency rules, sandbox reward formula, subtree pruning boundary, and eight red/green TDD tasks. Implementation code remains not started. Verification after creating the Phase 5 field spec passed: Phase 5 field spec placeholder/stale scan had no hits; stale no-final-field-spec wording scan had no hits in progress.md, session-handoff.md, feature_list.json, and Doc/agent-navigation.md; feature_list.json UTF-8 parse passed; key UTF-8 BOM scan had no hits; Phase 5 anchor check passed; .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 133 items and 133 passed in 4.22s. 2026-06-25: Hardened Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-merge-contribution-settlement-field-spec.md after implementation-readiness review. Closed the pre-start P1/P2 gaps by making settlement entries artifact-backed and replay-rebuildable, requiring visible TASK_EXPANDED / complete expansion batch facts before merge task creation, and adding pruning policy provenance fields plus red tests for descriptor/source-event mismatches. Phase 5 implementation code remains not started. Verification passed: Phase 5 field spec placeholder scan had no hits; stale optional/inline settlement entries scan had no blocking hits; feature_list.json UTF-8 parse passed; key UTF-8 BOM scan had no hits; .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 134 items and 134 passed in 4.99s. 2026-06-25: Implemented Phase 5 Task 1 pure models, event constants, and state rules. Added src/tokenshare/core/merge.py, src/tokenshare/core/contribution.py, tests/core/test_phase5_models.py, and Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-25-phase-5-code-map.md; updated src/tokenshare/storage/events.py with Phase 5 event constants. TDD evidence: pre-task .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 134 items and 134 passed; red targeted test failed with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tokenshare.core.contribution'; supplemental red failed with 1 failed, 6 passed for RequiredSlotBinding canonical output ref validation; green targeted test passed with 7 passed in 0.13s. Scope remains Task 1 only: no ProtocolEngine flow, no SQLite Phase 5 projection, no Phase 5 integration, no Phase 6, no real network executor, no production AI API, and no real chain settlement. Final Task 1 status-sync verification: targeted tests\core\test_phase5_models.py passed with 7 passed in 0.09s; .\init.ps1 passed with pytest collected 141 items and 141 passed in 4.88s. 2026-06-26: Phase 5 Task 2 merge task creation batch implemented in `src/tokenshare/core/merge_coordinator.py` and `tests/test_phase5_merge_task_creation_flow.py`; required slots are canonical-only, `merge_input_bundle` is staged until `MERGE_TASK_LINK_RECORDED`, targeted pytest passed with `16 passed in 0.92s`, and final `.\init.ps1` passed with pytest collected 151 items and `151 passed in 6.25s`. 2026-06-26: Phase 5 Task 3 merge resolution batch and Task 4 contribution creation are implemented in the current worktree. Task 4 added `ContributionCoordinator` and `tests/test_phase5_contribution_settlement_flow.py`; complete/expand/merge canonical source batches now create deterministic contributions, retries are idempotent, and losing/canonical-loser/late/shadow attempts do not create contribution records. Task 4 red failed on missing `ContributionCoordinator`, supplemental red failed on incomplete expansion batch wording, Task 4 targeted passed with `7 passed in 0.85s`, Phase 5 targeted passed with `31 passed in 2.68s`, and final `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1` passed with pytest collected 165 items and `165 passed in 6.86s`. 2026-06-26: Phase 5 Task 5 parent completion batch implemented in `src/tokenshare/protocol_engine.py`; owner completion now requires all supplied required expected outputs to have matching complete merge-resolution facts, writes `parent_completion_batch:{owner_unit_id}:{resolved_output_set_digest}` in fixed order, promotes `expand_canonical Pending` to `Eligible`, rejects partial resolution, keeps identical resolved sets idempotent, and conflicts on different resolved sets. Task 5 red failed with 5 expected missing-method failures while 14 prior target tests passed; targeted pytest passed with `19 passed in 2.67s`; final `.\init.ps1` passed with pytest collected 170 items and `170 passed in 7.28s`. 2026-06-26: Phase 5 Task 6 root-level sandbox settlement batch implemented in `src/tokenshare/protocol_engine.py`; settlement now rebuilds current eligible contribution state from the ledger, rejects partial settlement, writes all `Eligible -> Settled` events plus final `SETTLEMENT_RECORDED` in `settlement_batch:{task_id}:{root_unit_id}:{root_completion_event_seq}`, and requires `SETTLEMENT_RECORDED` to reference a full `SettlementEntry[]` artifact via `settlement_entries_ref`. Existing settlement replay validates entries artifact digest, entry_count, reward total, and same-batch settled contribution events; root_budget=0 still creates entries with zero rewards. Task 6 red failed with 11 expected missing-method failures while 8 prior target tests passed; targeted pytest passed with `19 passed in 3.38s`; Phase 5 targeted pytest passed with `47 passed in 5.92s`; full startup verification passed with `181 passed in 10.32s`. 2026-06-26: Phase 5 Task 8 SQLite projection, integration, and code map completed. Updated src/tokenshare/storage/sqlite_index.py with Phase 5 index-only projection tables for merge_task_links, merge_slot_bindings, merge_records, expected_output_resolutions, contributions, settlement_records, settlement_entries, and subtree_prunes; expected_output_refs now reflects resolved merge outputs. Rebuild gates merge_task_links/merge_slot_bindings on MERGE_TASK_LINK_RECORDED, gates merge_records/expected_output_resolutions on complete merge_resolution_batch, rebuilds settlement_entries from settlement_entries_ref artifact, rejects missing settlement entries artifact, digest mismatch, entry-event mismatch, pruning policy missing descriptor provenance, and incomplete Phase 5 batches, and covers merge -> parent completion -> root settlement integration. Added tests/storage/test_phase5_event_projection.py. A full pytest run first exposed a storage package circular import after Task 8; fixed by making SQLiteMaterializedIndex a lazy export in src/tokenshare/storage/__init__.py. Verification passed: tests/storage/test_phase5_event_projection.py -q returned 17 passed in 5.71s; Phase 5 targeted suite returned 66 passed in 14.17s; feature_list.json UTF-8 parse returned feature-list-json-ok; compileall -x reference_repos . passed; PYTHONPATH=src conda run -n tokenshare python -m pytest tests returned 207 passed in 26.37s; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\init.ps1 returned 207 passed in 22.06s. 2026-06-27: Phase 5 hardening fixed wrong batch id rebuild acceptance and settlement supplied-set over-acceptance. Red tests first failed with DID NOT RAISE for wrong merge_resolution_batch id and extra supplied eligible contribution; green checks passed with the new settlement/pruning projection hardening tests reporting 2 passed in 0.65s, the Phase 5 targeted suite reporting 77 passed in 17.16s, and final .\init.ps1 reporting 211 passed in 25.07s. feat-006 done criteria remain satisfied.

features.name: Phase 7 - Experimental AI API Executor
features.description: Implement an experiment-scoped AI API executor that can call a real model through the existing ExecutionRequest/ExecutionSubmission contract while preserving artifact, provenance, secret, and replay boundaries.
done_criteria: AI API executor receives a unified ExecutionRequest and returns a unified artifact-backed ExecutionSubmission
Provider, model, prompt package, raw output, parsed output or parse failure, usage, latency, cost, request id, and error provenance are persisted without storing API secrets
Success, timeout, rate limit, provider error, invalid JSON, and parse failure paths are testable and map to existing executor/submission error boundaries

At least one Phase 6 natural-language plugin fixture can run with either MockAIExecutor or the AI API executor without letting the executor mutate task graph, bind canonical output, decide rewards, or retry outside protocol control
State replay never calls the AI API and fails on missing historical output artifacts
features.evidence: 2026-06-27: Created after user clarified that protocol-correctness-only experiments are insufficient for a paper and that V1 should include an experiment-scoped AI API executor to validate real-model effect. Scope remains local research only: no production AI platform, no real distributed executor network, no real chain settlement, and no replay-time API calls. Route/docs sync validation passed with stale AI API / old phase mapping scan clean, feature-list-json-ok, git diff --check without whitespace errors, and .\init.ps1 collecting 211 tests with 211 passed in 22.00s.

features.name: Phase 8 - Experiment Infrastructure, Fault Simulation, and Metrics

features.name: Phase 9 - Replay and Audit

done_criteria: Final state can be rebuilt from JSONL events
